dict.string: Peeknook captures only when you press the capture hotkey, to answer practice questions about on-screen text.
Peeknook can read selected text to supplement a screenshot. Accessibility is optional; Screen Recording alone is enough to capture.
Peeknook uses the camera only when you open the live camera preview and press the shutter, to answer questions about paper, whiteboards, books, and other physical things.
Peeknook uses the microphone only when you turn on voice input to dictate session briefs and follow-ups.

Peeknook uses on-device speech recognition only when you turn on voice input to dictate, or when you turn on Hear system audio so a profile can transcribe what is playing. Audio is not sent to a cloud service.
